name: Zaxon
title: Enterprise Architect for Autonomous Revenue Systems

services.title: Digital Transformation Architecture
services.description: Design and implement autonomous revenue systems using MCP servers, zero-cost digital assets, and cryptocurrency settlement frameworks.

services.title: MCP Server Development
services.description: Build custom Model Context Protocol servers that turn any digital asset or service into an autonomous revenue generator.

services.title: Market Gap Analysis & Execution

services.title: Cryptocurrency Revenue Systems
services.description: Design and implement Bitcoin and cryptocurrency-based revenue streams using watch-only wallets, yield optimization, and automated settlement.

caseStudy.title: Zero-Cost Empire for Ethiopian SMEs
caseStudy.problem: 72.2% of Ethiopian SMEs lack digital presence. Traditional web agencies charge 5,000+ ETB for basic websites that don't generate revenue.
caseStudy.solution: Deployed zero-cost digital assets (business cards, websites) via GitHub Pages, monetized through MCP servers and Bitcoin microtemplates. First client: Gebo General Trading for 1,000 ETB.
caseStudy.result: Autonomous revenue system generating passive income. Client receives professional digital presence; architect receives settlement in Bitcoin or mobile money via 0986540218.
